title: Ghastling & Happy Ghast
description: This Ghast From Spring Minecraft Live 2025
body:
# **In this mod, I transferred the function of the new mob from the spring MINECRAFT LIVE 2025.** 
- **Happy Ghast** - if you put a blue harness on it, you can fly on it.
- **Gastling** - is a funny little ghast that can be fed with snowballs and a happy ghast will grow out of it.
- **Dried/Hydrated ghast** - if you poke them with water, they will become gastling

WPTT054P
